name: CertainLogic Onboarding Wizard
description: Guided questionnaire and recommendation system for new OpenClaw users. Generates personalized markdown starter guides. Nothing auto-installs — every step requires your action.
author: CertainLogic

commands.name: start
commands.description: Run the onboarding questionnaire and generate your starter guide

args.name: goal
args.description: Your primary goal (developer, business, research, productivity, beginner)
